query: Count all buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas.

1.description: resolve Kristiansand kommunenummer and get boundary geometry

2.description: select all buildings in the municipality using kommunenummer

4.description: extract storm-surge areas that intersect the municipality boundary

5.description: find buildings that intersect the municipality storm-surge areas
